_meta.description: External integrations and configurations - drop-in ready templates

_aiRules.description: Rules for AI assistants editing this file
beforeEditing: ALWAYS verify changes with user before committing
CHECK the _accessLevel field on any section before editing
prohibited: Do NOT make changes without user awareness
NEVER expose API keys, secrets, or credentials in this file
NEVER edit fields marked as DEVELOPER_ONLY without explicit user request
NEVER modify envVar, apiEndpoint, or webhook fields without developer approval
fileSpecific: External service URLs (review links, FareHarbor, Z2Systems) require verification before changing
When adding new integrations, include _accessLevel and _staffNote fields
Respect the editingPermissions matrix - STAFF_EDITABLE vs DEVELOPER_ONLY
For review platform URLs, only update the 'url' or 'reviewUrl' fields, not 'placeId' or 'pageId'
Environment variables are secrets stored in Vercel - reference by name only, never include values
securityRules: API keys and webhook secrets must ONLY be referenced by environment variable name
Never suggest hardcoding credentials even in examples
Flag any section containing 'secret', 'key', 'token', or 'password' for developer review
_aiRules.whenUnsure: Ask the user for clarification, especially for DEVELOPER_ONLY sections

_meta.instructions: Set 'configured' to true and add credentials/URLs when ready
_meta.staffInstructions: This file configures external services like review platforms, booking systems, and analytics. MOST sections require a developer to change. Look for 'STAFF EDITABLE' labels to find what you CAN safely update yourself.

DEVELOPER_ONLY: API keys and secrets (NEVER edit these)

howToUpdateReviewURLs: 2. Locate the platform you need to update (google, tripadvisor, facebook)
4. Do NOT change 'enabled', 'configured', 'placeId', or 'pageId' without asking a developer
5. Test the new URL in your browser before saving

warningSymbols.envVar: DEVELOPER ONLY - This references a secret stored in Vercel, not in this file
warningSymbols.apiEndpoint: DEVELOPER ONLY - API routes require code changes
warningSymbols.webhook: DEVELOPER ONLY - Webhooks involve server configuration
warningSymbols.configured: DEVELOPER ONLY - Changing this can break features

newsletter._staffNote: Email newsletter signup is not yet active. Contact developer when ready to set up.
newsletter.name: Email Newsletter Signup
newsletter.notes: Form currently commented out. Mailchimp free tier supports 500 contacts.

reviews._staffNote: You CAN update the review URLs if they change. Do NOT change 'enabled', 'configured', 'placeId', or 'pageId' fields.
reviews.name: Review Platform Links

google.notes: Rocky Mount Google Business review link - STAFF: Update 'reviewUrl' if Google provides a new share link

tripadvisor.notes: STAFF: Update 'url' if TripAdvisor page URL changes. Need TripAdvisor management portal access for responding to reviews.

facebook.notes: STAFF: Update 'reviewUrl' only if Facebook page URL changes

yelp.notes: Yelp not currently in use. Contact developer to enable.

fareHarbor._staffNote: FareHarbor booking is managed through the FareHarbor dashboard, not this file. Contact developer for any changes here.
fareHarbor.name: FareHarbor Booking
fareHarbor.notes: Fully configured - items managed in FareHarbor dashboard

analytics._staffNote: Analytics tracking is fully automated. Do not modify any values in this section.
analytics.name: Analytics Suite

vercel.name: Vercel Analytics
vercel.notes: Verify enabled in Vercel project settings

ga4Server.name: Google Analytics 4 (Server)
ga4Server.notes: Needs GA4_API_SECRET for webhook purchase tracking

reviewStation._staffNote: The iPad review station is fully set up. Contact developer if you need to change the password or setup.
reviewStation.name: On-Site Review iPad Station
reviewStation.notes: Standalone HTML form for iPad. Password verified via API (not hardcoded). Data exports to CSV.

z2systems._staffNote: You CAN update the membership and donation URLs if Z2Systems provides new links. Do NOT change 'domain' or 'orgId'.
z2systems.name: Z2Systems Membership/Donations

urls._instructions: Update these URLs if Z2Systems provides new form links

z2systems.notes: Currently hardcoded - could be moved to this config

weather._staffNote: Weather services for the Almanac page. Fully automated - no changes needed.
weather.name: Weather Data Services (Almanac)
weather.notes: All free/public APIs - excellent weather infrastructure

maps._staffNote: You CAN update the directions URL if the address changes. Do NOT change other settings.
maps.name: Map & Location Services
maps.notes: Using direct Google Maps links (no API key needed). STAFF: Update directionsUrl only if site address changes.

calendar._staffNote: Calendar export feature is ready but not yet connected to event pages. Contact developer to enable.
calendar.name: Event Calendar Export
calendar.notes: ICS generation code exists - needs to be wired to event pages

social._staffNote: You CAN update social media handles and URLs when accounts change. These appear in the website footer.
social._instructions: To update: Change both 'handle' AND 'url' together. Set 'configured' to true when complete, false if account doesn't exist.
social.name: Social Media Links

twitter.notes: Referenced in metadata but handle not set - update when account is created

youtube.notes: Update when YouTube channel is created

futureIntegrations._staffNote: These are planned features for the future. Contact developer if you want to prioritize any of these.

socialAutoPost.name: Social Media Auto-Posting
socialAutoPost.notes: Auto-share new events to Facebook/Instagram via Meta Graph API

environmentVariables._staffNote: Environment variables are secrets stored in Vercel, NOT in this file. Never share or edit these values. Contact developer for any changes.
environmentVariables._instructions: Add these to Vercel project settings. Template in .env.example
